scripts.render: remotion render TangPaperAnimation out/tang-paper-render.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --concurrency=1 --overwrite && remotion ffmpeg -y -i out/tang-paper-render.mp4 -map 0:v:0 -c:v copy -an out/tang-paper-silent.mp4
scripts.render:image: remotion render TangPaperImageAnimation out/tang-paper-independent-stickers-render.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --concurrency=1 --overwrite && remotion ffmpeg -y -i out/tang-paper-independent-stickers-render.mp4 -map 0:v:0 -c:v copy -an out/tang-paper-independent-stickers-silent.mp4
scripts.render:zhenghe: remotion render ZhengHeStory out/zhenghe-story-render.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --concurrency=1 --overwrite && remotion ffmpeg -y -i out/zhenghe-story-render.mp4 -map 0:v:0 -c:v copy -an out/zhenghe-story-silent.mp4
